lightning_fart.name: Lightning Fart
lightning_fart.description: Leo unleashes a shockwave fart that clears nearby enemies and obstacles.

slingshot.name: Slingshot
slingshot.description: Warren fires a rock that can hit enemies from a distance.

super_strength.name: Super Strength
super_strength.description: MJ destroys or shoves a nearby obstacle out of the way.

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.description: The party becomes invisible to enemies and obstacles for a short time.

speed_boost.name: Speed Boost
speed_boost.description: Justin pushes the pace - everyone moves faster for a few seconds.

team_boost.name: Team Boost
team_boost.description: The whole crew goes all out - massive speed increase. Requires all members.
